footer.tagline: The AI assistant that transforms patient care in clinics across Latin America.
footer.bottomTagline: Building the future of healthcare in Latam

hero.description: Meet Kora and Nora, AI assistants that have handled over 127 conversations in clinics and seek the most advanced cases on the planet.

aiLatam.heading: We process millions of conversations to understand clinical complexity
aiLatam.description: Culturally sensitive cases and scale and volume of care. Kora understands the Latin American medical context like no other AI.

cta.description: Join hundreds of clinics already transforming their patients' experience with Konko.

founder.heading: Made with love
founder.body1: At Konko.ai we won't sacrifice your nights and entire weekends trying to make your clinic run better.
founder.body2: Our mission is to give back time and simplicity to every clinic, so you can focus on what matters most.

meetKora.heading: Meet Kora
meetKora.description: The new AI assistant that will help you transform your clinic with technology from the best in the world.

scheduling.title: Convert more messages into scheduled appointments
scheduling.description: Don't lose patients by not responding in time. Kora replies instantly on WhatsApp and automatically schedules appointments.

loyalty.title: Build patient loyalty with the best care
loyalty.description: Kora remembers every detail, sends personalized reminders, and follows up post-consultation automatically.

efficiency.title: Free your team from operational chaos
efficiency.description: Your staff stops answering repetitive WhatsApps and focuses on what matters most: the patient in front of them.

analytics.title: Gain full visibility and control
analytics.description: Real-time dashboard of all your consultations and conversations. Make better decisions every day.

implementation.title: Ready in days and improving every day
implementation.description: Onboarding in less than 48 hours. Kora learns about your clinic and continuously improves with each conversation.

metaPartner.heading: We are official Meta partners
metaPartner.description: We use the official WhatsApp Business API infrastructure to guarantee speed, stability, and a reliable experience for every patient.

metrics.heroLabel: messages processed per month across the entire Konko platform

testimonials.quote: Kora completely transformed appointment management at our clinic. We reduced cancellations by 60% in the first month.
testimonials.name: Dr. Carlos Méndez

testimonials.quote: The team can focus on patients instead of answering WhatsApps all day. Productivity increased incredibly.
testimonials.name: Dra. María Torres

testimonials.quote: Konko's AI understands the medical context in a way other platforms simply can't. It's like having an expert receptionist 24/7.
testimonials.name: Dr. Juan Echandi

security.heading: Security in every conversation
security.description: Your patients' information is protected with the highest industry security standards.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.description: All conversations are encrypted with AES-256.

noRetention.title: No data retention
noRetention.description: Medical data is never used to train models.

specialties.heading: Designed for your specialty
specialties.description: Kora adapts and understands the patients of each type of clinic. From dentistry to cardiology, Kora speaks your specialty's language.

heading.line2: A clinical assistant you could offer your patients

talkToKora.description: Kora responds 24/7 on WhatsApp, understands medical context, and schedules appointments like your best receptionist — but without interruptions and without errors.

messages.user1: Hi, I want to schedule an appointment with Dr. García
messages.kora1: Hello! Sure, I can help you. What is your availability this week?
messages.kora2: Perfect! I have Tuesday the 14th at 3:30 PM or Wednesday the 15th at 4:00 PM available. Which do you prefer?

trustedBy.label: Hundreds of clinics already trust us
